Add in some Images Add in Author Badge at top Add in Page summary on the right Try make page take the custom BG Profile#I have a proven track record of leading and driving change initiatives in a project capacity, as well as strong performance in a BAU role, delivering consistent results, and finding critical process or functional improvements. I bring the ability to seek opportunities and provide support in the delivery of outcomes, a willingness to learn, and a fresh outlook to any challenge.
Download my Resume in a PDF Format!#Wire this button up to download PDFExperience#MeridianAug 2024 - May 2026Data AnalystTODOTODOTODOTODOTODOTODOTODOAchievementsDigi-Gen I3Suggestion BoxCRMTODOMinistry of EducationFeb 2023 - Aug 2024Web AdviserExtraction and transformation of website data through GA4Creation of customized GTM tags to support content and marketing objectivesCreation of dynamic dashboards to support business development in Looker StudioCreation, management, and consulting relating to Survey Monkey surveysContent / Structural Management of all business Vimeo uploadsPerforming functional and accessibility testing of Ministry WebsitesCMS/Backend content uploading and editing in SilverStripe & DrupalAchievementsMigrated 100 Surveys from Legacy Forms Platform to Survey MonkeyStood up GA4 to BigQuery Data PipelineCreated 30 tailored analytics dashboards for internal business groupsSuccessfully migrated Vimeo account to Enterprise solutionMinistry of EducationOct 2021 -
